summary: CPR Page redesign testing completed successfully. All requested features verified working: CPR/Recording tabs, track-based navigation (VF/pVT, Asystole/PEA, Narrow QRS, Wide QRS), weight-based drug calculations, timer with event logging, and 2-minute pulse check reminder.

cpr_tab_features: CPR and Recording tabs display correctly
Weight input field accepts input and triggers drug calculations
CPR basics card shows Rate (100-120/min), Depth (⅓ AP diameter), C:V ratio (15:2), CPR fraction (>60%)
VF/pVT (Shockable) button opens shockable rhythm track
Asystole/PEA (Non-Shockable) button opens non-shockable rhythm track
Narrow QRS button opens SVT treatment track
Wide QRS button opens VT treatment track
Previous/Next Step buttons navigate through algorithm steps
Back button returns to main rhythm selection screen
Step progress indicators show current position in track
Quick Drug Doses section expands to show calculated values
Reversible Causes (H's & T's) section expands correctly
recording_tab_features: Timer displays elapsed time in MM:SS format
Pulse button records event with timestamp
Rx button records event with timestamp
Shock button records event with timestamp
Event Log displays all recorded events with elapsed time and timestamp
Time since last pulse check tracks correctly
Reset button clears timer and all events

critical_code_review_comments: CPRPage.jsx is well-structured at 1053 lines with clear component separation (StartScreen, ShockableTrack, NonShockableTrack, NarrowQRSTrack, WideQRSTrack, RecordingTab)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Drug calculations use correct PALS 2025 dosing formulas
Timer uses useRef and useEffect for proper cleanup to prevent memory leaks
2-minute pulse check reminder logic implemented correctly with showReminder state
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPR page at /children/cpr has been redesigned with CPR/Recording tabs. All four rhythm tracks (VF/pVT, Asystole/PEA, Narrow QRS, Wide QRS) work with step-by-step navigation. Recording tab timer and event logging fully functional. Drug calculations are weight-based and show correct values.

features_verified.cpr_tab_initial_view: ✓ Shows CPR basics and 4 rhythm selection buttons
features_verified.vf_pvt_track: ✓ Shockable rhythm track with 7 steps, defibrillation doses
features_verified.asystole_pea_track: ✓ Non-shockable rhythm track with 7 steps, epinephrine emphasis
features_verified.narrow_qrs_track: ✓ SVT treatment track with vagal maneuvers, adenosine doses
features_verified.wide_qrs_track: ✓ VT treatment track with amiodarone, cardioversion doses
features_verified.drug_calculations: ✓ All doses calculate correctly based on weight input
features_verified.pulse_reminder: ✓ Time since last pulse check displays correctly
